title: Triggers
text: Triggers The Triggers pane lists the triggers available for the menu item selected in the Structure pane. Use the Triggers pane to select the trigger you want to edit. Icons Trigger contains code and does not inherit. Trigger is empty. Actions You can navigate and sort triggers, and manage tags using menu items are available from the Edit menu, pop-up menu, and tool bar. Table 1. Trigger List Menu Items Action/Menu Item Tool Bar Icon Description Sort Triggers Sort triggers by name or by type (based on the trigger icons). Click the header of the Trigger List to reverse the sort order. Add Manual Tag Mark a trigger for later reference. Clear Manual Tags Clear all manually defined tags. Delete Manual Tag Delete the selected manual tag. Check Syntax Check the ProcScript syntax in all modified triggers. Triggers that contain errors are tagged and placed in the Tag Tree. Double-click the tagged trigger to edit it. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
